lead_profile_text: Renovated 3-bed on market ~1 year. Two failed sales. Sandy SG19. Lives 1.5hrs away — needs managed service. Mortgage £1,300/mo residential. STL gross ~£46,688/yr (£200 nightly, 65% occ). Net ~£24,278/yr (~£2,023/mo). Bills ~£5,000/yr. Property profitable after all costs. New burst of viewings at time of meeting. Partner risk-averse, was not on call.
emotional_profile: Practically minded. Wants property to work financially while on market. Partner is risk-averse and wasn't on call — requires second-hand persuasion. Language: 'protect the property from being battered', 'risk-averse partner', 'purely financial sense'.
lost_reason: No response after offer expired 1 May 2026

top_objections.text: Partner is risk-averse and needs figures to confirm property covers all costs before committing
top_objections.zac_response: Net income ~£24,278/yr (~£2,023/mo) clearly exceeds mortgage £1,300/mo + bills ~£5,000/yr — property profitable after all costs

top_objections.text: New burst of viewings — property may sell before STL decision is made
top_objections.zac_response: STL and sales listing can run simultaneously; STL earns income during the sales wait

top_objections.text: Early termination concern if property sells
top_objections.zac_response: Early termination available at £1,000 fee — modest vs potential STL income

top_questions.text: Will it actually cover all the costs including the mortgage?
top_questions.answer: Yes — STL net ~£24,278/yr (~£2,023/mo) comfortably exceeds £1,300/mo mortgage + ~£417/mo bills
~3 weeks from signing to going live

top_questions.text: Can we stay on the market while doing STL?
top_questions.answer: Yes — property can remain listed for sale and do STL simultaneously

what_moved_them: Property clearly profitable after ALL costs — partner's core concern directly addressed
Can remain on market simultaneously — no either/or decision required
what_fell_flat: Partner not on the call — couldn't close the decision maker directly
New burst of viewings distracted decision — 'may just sell it'
No response after offer expiry — follow-up attempts unsuccessful

conversion_gaps.gap: Risk-averse partner not present on call — second-hand persuasion required
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Always ask if partner/spouse can join; if not, send joint summary email with clear cost vs income table for non-present partner to review

conversion_gaps.gap: Active sale viewings created 'wait and see' mindset
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Frame STL as a hedge against sale falling through again — two failed sales already; STL earns while listing continues
Re-engage 4-6 weeks post-expiry with updated projections or new offer mechanism

offer_framing: 13% management fee (vs standard 15%) if signed by 1 May 2026 — framed as saving on costs while property earns income on market
zac_income_intro: Gross ~£46,688/yr at £200/night and 65% occupancy — net ~£24,278/yr after all costs
zac_transition_phrases: protect the property from being battered
